input_text: A garden wall was high. The street is in Tallinn. Estonia is not outside Europe. The guide offered the tourists tea. The stone was heavy. Mice are afraid of cats. The rain continued. The owner of the horse of Mike smiled. John is nice. The man carrying a bag waved. A kitchen door was open. Bears eat all boxers. Elephant's head is green. Mary decided to leave. Mark is not in the box. The bike is small. Agatha is in trouble. Is it false that John is nice?
